lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully operational and function as new.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable daily driver for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics. The exterior has several minor door dings and some noticeable paint chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows clear signs of age, including some light staining on the carpets and wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well, though it is due for a routine oil change and the tires will likely need replacement within the next 5,000 miles. It is a functional, honest car that has been maintained regularly but shows its age.

This vehicle is in fair condition and functions well as a daily driver, though it clearly shows the wear and tear of its years on the road. Mechanically, the engine is reliable and starts consistently, but there is a slow oil seep that will need monitoring and the suspension feels a bit soft over bumps. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the roof, and a small dent on the rear passenger door. Inside, the upholstery is intact but has some staining and the driver's seat shows significant bolster wear. All major electronics work, though the air conditioning takes a few minutes to get truly cold. It’s a solid, functional car for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible wear on both the interior and exterior. While it is currently operational, it shows signs of age and may require mechanical maintenance.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that gets the job done at a great price? This car has plenty of life left and offers a solid driving experience! While it shows some visible wear and tear from its years of service, it remains a dependable choice for your daily commutes. It’s an honest, functional ride perfect for someone who values utility and value!

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical upkeep and an interior preserved with care, this automobile offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. It presents an exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber asset at a competitive market valuation.

Hi there! 👋 I’m looking to find a new home for my awesome car! It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures. It runs smoothly and looks great—I’ve really enjoyed my time with it, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it too. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E92 M3 represents a mechanically robust example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 era. The naturally aspirated power plant pulls cleanly to its 8,400 RPM redline, benefiting from recent preventative rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to a functional M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal traction out of corners. The chassis retains its composure with active Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and rigid subframe mounting. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a lustrous metallic finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery and a fully functional infotainment suite. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine delivers consistent power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly through every gear. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection just completed. Equipped with premium all-weather mats and tires showing excellent tread depth, this car is ready for the road immediately. Experience a reliable, high-end drive that has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a premier balance of performance and reliability. This unit has been rigorously vetted to ensure mechanical integrity and features a clean, professional aesthetic both inside and out. Representing a significant value proposition for the discerning driver, it remains in robust operational state and is prepared for immediate acquisition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it remains in commendable condition, ensuring a refined driving experience for its next owner. We invite discerning buyers to appreciate the superior build quality and well-preserved aesthetics of this premium offering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute perfection for me. It’s been super well-maintained and still has so much life left in it—perfect for someone who wants a reliable daily driver that looks great on the road. It’s super clean inside and out, drives like a dream, and is just waiting for its next adventure with you. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a full VANOS refresh and rear subframe reinforcement for structural integrity. The suspension is upgraded with Bilstein adjustable dampers for improved lateral grip, paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential.
Used car. Reliable condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. No mechanical issues.

Presented in a classic finish, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition throughout. The bodywork is straight and clean, showing only the slight, expected signs of careful use over the years that do not detract from its overall appeal. Inside, the cabin offers a pleasant environment with well-preserved seating, intact trim, and all electronic features operating as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs strong and the transmission shifts smoothly, reflecting a consistent service history. It provides a refined and reliable driving experience, making it a solid choice for a buyer looking for a high-quality, honest vehicle that is ready for the road.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Distinguished by its consistent service history and superior road manners, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. A turnkey acquisition that exemplifies quality and enduring value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. A premier choice for the discerning driver, it represents a sophisticated acquisition for those who demand quality and consistent care in their automotive investments.

Hey there! I’m parting with my reliable ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, making it perfect for your daily commutes or those fun weekend getaways. Everything runs smoothly, and the interior is still looking great and feeling comfy! You’re going to absolutely love how it handles on the road. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use, while the original alloy wheels remain crisp and curb-rash free. Step inside to a smoke-free cabin where the premium leather seating remains supple and supportive, showing no significant wear or tears. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and recent preventative maintenance, including new brake pads and a fresh battery. This car drives straight, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, confident ride that feels as solid today as it did on day one. It is a turn-key example ready for its next long-term owner.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and mechanical integrity. Experience the sophistication and enduring value inherent in this well-preserved example.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a refined interior that reflects its careful stewardship. A premier choice for those seeking authoritative road presence and sustained mechanical integrity, this model provides exceptional value for its class.

Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs reliably.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor signs of careful use consistent with its age, such as small stone chips on the front bumper and a faint scuff on the rear passenger door. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, though the driver’s seat displays light natural creasing from regular use. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in its prime. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent oil change and a multi-point inspection performed last month. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are seamless, and the tires have significant tread remaining. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example ready for its next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver. Characterized by robust mechanical performance and a refined interior, it has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards of reliability and presentation. A premier selection for those seeking a balance of luxury and proven longevity.
